ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Poster path of the movie */,
  "video" INTEGER /* Whether the movie has a video or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_collections" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_countries" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the movie in minutes
Number of votes for the movie
Whether the movie has a video or not
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer)
Date of last login of the user
Date when the rating was given
Date when the movie was watched
Date when the search was made
